ModDescription: Weapons grow as they kill -- each weapon counts its kills, lifts the wielder's stats, and the iconic weapons awaken signature abilities, with the running tally shown on the equip card. Bundles a full item rebalance (so a weapon you invest in never becomes vendor trash) and Treasure Master (equip the Scholar's Ring to reveal hidden treasure on the battlefield). Authoritative item mod, so disable other item-rebalance mods (e.g. Regabonds Rebalance, Equipment Replacer).
